topics.title: Animal Performers and Political Media
topics.summary: The studio explores the absurdity of bands featuring animal vocalists like Caninus and discusses how personal beliefs regarding politics and environmentalism influence media consumption.

topics.title: Celebrity Struggles and Comedy Roast Highlights
topics.summary: The studio discusses Carney Wilson's public battle with alcohol addiction, the details of a recent comedy roast for Mario Batali, and personal anecdotes regarding driving habits and past behavior.

topics.title: Near-Fatal Traffic Incident and Football Pool
topics.summary: The studio features a recount of a narrow escape from a multi-car collision at a busy intersection, followed by a discussion on listener feedback regarding news segments and the current standings of a $25,000 football pool.

topics.title: Football Pool Negotiations and UFC Guest Preview
topics.summary: The studio navigates a complex negotiation regarding the distribution of winnings for a football pool contest before preparing to welcome guests from the UFC and the music scene.

topics.title: Custom Porn Business and Drug Relapse Concerns
topics.summary: The studio features an interview with a porn star who offers custom-made videos, followed by a discussion regarding Artie's physical appearance and potential drug relapse.

topics.title: MMA Fighter and Personal History
topics.summary: The studio features a discussion with an MMA fighter about his career, his relationship with Jenna Jameson, and his upbringing with heroin-addicted parents.

topics.title: Tito Ortiz Discusses Gang Life and UFC Career
topics.summary: The studio features Tito Ortiz as he recounts his transition from a childhood gang member in California to a professional fighter and entrepreneur.

topics.title: Tito Ortiz and UFC Promotion
topics.summary: The studio features Tito Ortiz discussing his upcoming fight against Chuck Liddell, the nuances of mixed martial arts training, and various fan interactions regarding the sport.

topics.title: Comedy, Safety, and Personal Security
topics.summary: The studio explores a comedian's experiences with personal safety, his legal issues regarding weapons at an airport, and the complexities of navigating security in the entertainment industry.

topics.title: Cat Williams Discusses Safety and Family
topics.summary: The studio explores Cat Williams' experiences with personal safety while touring, his decision to adopt seven children, and the realities of navigating fame within the hip-hop community.

topics.title: Legal Issues and Celebrity Justice
topics.summary: The studio explores the disparity in legal treatment for celebrities versus average citizens while discussing personal experiences with bail, firearms, and prison.

topics.title: Gossip Game and Ribs Prize
topics.summary: The studio features a segment where the hosts identify fake gossip stories from Mike Walker before transitioning into a trivia game with a rib dinner as the prize.

topics.title: Production Disputes and Guest Comparisons
topics.summary: The studio experiences a heated internal argument regarding production choices and the airing of specific segments before transitioning into a discussion about past guests like Tiny Tim and current recurring characters.

topics.title: Comedy Censorship and Promotional Merchandise
topics.summary: The studio discusses a comedian's stance on racial slurs, promotes branded keychains for listeners, and reviews upcoming news segments including baby language research.

topics.title: Michael Richards Controversy and Drug Awareness
topics.summary: The studio discusses a child's heroic act in a costume, Michael Richards' claims of Jewish identity and past behavior on set, Nicole Kidman's earnings, and the dangers of methamphetamine during National Methamphetamine Awareness Day.

topics.title: Public Health and Current Events
topics.summary: The show covers topics including AIDS awareness, the investigation into the shooting of Sean Bell, diplomatic tensions in Iraq, the arrest of Snoop Dogg, and concerns regarding violent video games.
